_comment: Two-tone Lissajous fixture: 1024 samples tracing a figure-eight (x = 0.8·sin θ, y = 0.8·sin 2θ) in the normalized Q1.15 plane, one per sclk rising edge. Bind xSample→sample, ySample→imag (symbolClock optional — lissajous latches on the clock when bound, else free-running). Regenerate with dart run tool/generate_dsp_fixtures.dart.
